name: failing_scenarios_finder_agent
description: Checks the last 5 Jenkins executions of a job, identifies scenarios failing in 2 or more runs, and highlights high-impact steps that fail across multiple scenarios
welcomeMessage:
👋 Hello! I'm the Failing Scenarios Finder agent

I'll check the last 5 executions of a Jenkins job and find:
  • Scenarios currently failing (last build + at least 1 previous)
  • Historical failures no longer active in the latest build
  • High-impact steps that fail across multiple scenarios (fix one, unblock many!)

Which job are we going to check today?
Ex: "commerce-automation/presales/studio-kaos/tickets-sustainment-dlr-latest"
